task_completion.description: The agent opened Diagrams.net (draw.io) to create the schematic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Diagrams.net (draw.io) application interface is visible on the screen with a blank or active canvas.

task_completion.description: The schematic illustrates the correct airflow path sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for shapes arranged and connected in the following order: Mixing (dampers) -> Filter -> Heating -> Cooling -> Fan.

task_completion.description: The schematic includes the required components and sensors with their exact tags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels on or near the shapes containing the exact tags: SF-1, CC-1, HC-1, PF-1, FF-1, OAD-1, RAD-1, SAT, MAT, RAT, and DSP.

task_completion.description: The schematic uses SOLID lines for physical connections and DASHED lines for logical control connections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for solid lines connecting the main physical components (dampers, filters, coils, fan) and dashed lines connecting sensors (SAT, MAT, RAT, DSP) or control signals.

task_completion.description: The source file is saved as AHU-1_Schematic.drawio in the ~/Diagrams/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the path ~/Diagrams/ (or /home/ga/Diagrams/) and the filename 'AHU-1_Schematic.drawio', or the filename appearing in the draw.io title bar after saving.

task_completion.description: The schematic is exported as a PDF named AHU-1_Schematic.pdf in the ~/Diagrams/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Export as PDF' dialog in draw.io, or a file manager/save dialog showing 'AHU-1_Schematic.pdf' being saved to the ~/Diagrams/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Diagrams.net (draw.io) GUI to create the schematic.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the draw.io toolbars, menus, and canvas, rather than writing XML code in a text editor or using terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent manually constructed the diagram by placing and connecting shapes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of shapes being dragged onto the canvas, labeled, and connected with lines, rather than a completed diagram instantly appearing.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io export functionality to create the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the 'File -> Export as -> PDF...' menu item in draw.io, rather than using a command-line conversion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required components to look for are: SF-1, CC-1, HC-1, PF-1, FF-1, OAD-1, RAD-1. The required sensors are: SAT, MAT, RAT, DSP. The source file must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Diagrams/AHU-1_Schematic.drawio and the PDF to /home/ga/Diagrams/AHU-1_Schematic.pdf.
